# Glow Flow Method

- **Landing:** [remiclassic.github.io/flow-guide/](https://remiclassic.github.io/flow-guide/)
- **Course dashboard:** [remiclassic.github.io/flow-guide/course/](https://remiclassic.github.io/flow-guide/course/)

Static HTML/CSS/JS. GitHub Pages serves from the `main` branch root (`.nojekyll` disables Jekyll).

## Editing

**Canonical source = `course/`**. All lesson, module, and asset files should be edited inside the `course/` directory. The top-level `module-1/` … `module-5/` folders are deprecated copies; do not edit them.
